title.purpose: App header, money inputs, table amounts.

label.purpose: Field labels, sidebar rows, export labels.

shadows.name: dropdown-lift
shadows.purpose: Language dropdown on web only. Prefer border-only when revisiting.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Sidebar collapse, label fade, drawer slide. Duration 220–280ms.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA on onboarding continue bar and welcome screen.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 100%; padding: 16px 24px; border: none; border-radius: 10px; background: #2563EB; color: #FFFFFF; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.1px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), opacity 0.2s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.92; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #1D4ED8; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2563EB; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { background: #D1D5DB; cursor: not-allowed; opacity: 1; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 16px 24px; border: 1.5px solid #D1DCF0; border-radius: 10px; background: transparent; color: #6B7A99; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 400; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: rgba(30, 58, 95, 0.05); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2563EB; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Option Card
components.description: Selectable onboarding choice row with optional emoji icon.
components.css: .ds-option-card { display: flex; align-items: center; width: 100%; padding: 14px 18px; margin-bottom: 10px; border: 1.5px solid #D1DCF0; border-radius: 10px; background: #F8FAFF; color: #1E3A5F; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; text-align: left; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.2s, background 0.2s; } .ds-option-card:hover { border-color: #2563EB; background: rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.04); } .ds-option-card:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2563EB; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-option-card.ds-selected { border-color: #1E3A5F; background: rgba(30, 58, 95, 0.04); font-weight: 600; } .ds-option-icon { font-size: 20px; margin-right: 12px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard labeled field with focus border shift to accent blue.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-field-label { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: #6B7A99; } .ds-input { padding: 14px 16px; border: 2.5px solid #D1DCF0; border-radius: 10px; background: #F8FAFF; color: #1E3A5F; font-size: 17px; transition: border-color 0.2s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6B7A99; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #2563EB; outline: none; } .ds-input:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.25); }

components.name: Suggestion Chip
components.description: Toggle chip for quick-add rows in onboarding.
components.css: .ds-chip { padding: 12px 14px; border: 1.5px solid #D1DCF0; border-radius: 12px; background: #F8FAFF; color: #6B7A99; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.2s, background 0.2s, color 0.2s; } .ds-chip:hover { background: #EFF4FB; } .ds-chip.ds-active { border-color: #1E3A5F; background: #DBEAFE; color: #1E3A5F; font-weight: 600; } .ds-chip:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2563EB; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Row
components.description: App sidebar navigation item with fixed icon slot.
components.css: .ds-nav-row { display: flex; align-items: center; height: 40px; padding: 0 8px 0 6px; margin: 0 8px; border: none; border-radius: 10px; background: transparent; color: #6B7A99; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s; } .ds-nav-row:hover { background: rgba(30, 58, 95, 0.05); } .ds-nav-row.ds-active { background: #DBEAFE; color: #1E3A5F; font-weight: 600; } .ds-nav-row:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2563EB; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-nav-icon { width: 40px; height: 40px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Frequency Pill
components.description: Rounded pill for income/cost frequency selection.
components.css: .ds-pill { padding: 14px 16px; border: 1px solid #D1DCF0; border-radius: 99px; background: #EFF4FB; color: #6B7A99; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, color 0.2s, border-color 0.2s; } .ds-pill:hover { background: rgba(30, 58, 95, 0.05); } .ds-pill.ds-selected { background: #1E3A5F; border-color: #1E3A5F; color: #FFFFFF; } .ds-pill:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2563EB; outline-offset: 2px; }

narrative.overview: Bida looks and feels like a calm personal ledger brought into software: navy ink on cool paper, one blue accent for actions, and density only where money math demands it. The interface serves a couple or family sitting down in the evening to understand income, costs, and what is left to spend. It should feel trustworthy and familiar, not like a fintech marketing site or a generic AI workflow tool.
keyCharacteristics: Restrained color strategy: tinted cool neutrals plus blue accent on primary actions and selection only
Single sans family (Inter) across all UI; fixed px scale, not fluid clamp typography
Flat surfaces at rest; depth via background tints, not decorative shadows
One question per screen during onboarding; progress bar and fixed continue bar
Collapsible left sidebar in the app shell; mobile drawer below 768px
Formal Czech and English locale parity on all user-facing copy

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Blue accent appears on primary actions, focus rings, and current selection. It is not a decorative wash across layouts.

rules.name: The Token Source Rule
rules.body: New screens import C, R, T, S from constants/onboarding-theme.js. Do not hardcode hex in components.

rules.name: The Fixed Scale Rule
rules.body: Product UI uses fixed px sizes from T.*, not clamp() fluid headings.

rules.name: The Sentence Case Rule
rules.body: Reserve uppercase for short badges, not section scaffolding on every screen.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Hover uses overlay rgba tints, not drop shadows.

rules.name: The No Ghost-Card Rule
rules.body: Never combine border 1px with soft shadows ≥16px blur on the same component.

dos: Do import colors, radius, type, and spacing from constants/onboarding-theme.js for all new onboarding and shell UI.
Do keep Gluestack and Tailwind configs synced when changing C.* values.
Do wire all user-facing copy through useI18n() with EN + CS keys in the same edit.
Do use Action Blue only for primary CTAs, focus, and selected state.
Do preserve sidebar icon column alignment during collapse animation.
Do show loading, validation, and active-route feedback on every interactive flow.
donts: Don't hardcode hex or rgba in components when a token exists in onboarding-theme.js.
Don't use uppercase tracked eyebrows on every section.
Don't pair 1px borders with wide soft drop shadows on cards or menus.
Don't use gradient text, glassmorphism, or decorative motion that does not convey state.
Don't mix onboarding inline tokens and NativeWind app screens without mapping to the same hex values.
Don't ship icon-only navigation without accessibilityLabel and expand affordances.
Don't use placeholder gray #9CA3AF on light surfaces; use muted #6B7A99.
